allow: Bash(python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf', fitz.__doc__[:40] if fitz.__doc__ else 'OK'\)")
PowerShell($n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($n\) { Write-Output $n.Source; node --version } else { Write-Output 'node NOT found' })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Killing PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on 8765" })
